metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_4838
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1,3: Piccolo (PCLO) antibody immunoprecipitation from P4 rat brain yields Daam1.

Figure 2: Daam1 is enriched in synaptosomal fractions and co-localizes with Piccolo in immmunostaining of cultured hippocampal neurons (16 DIV).

Figure 8: Daam1 is required for activity dependent assembly of presynaptic F-actin in cultured
hippocampal neurons (DIV15).

Monitoring recruitment of EGFP-actin to presynaptic boutons in cultured hippocampal neurons after pharmacological stimulus using live cell fluorescent imaging, authors showed that shRNA knockdown of both Piccolo and Daam1 result in strongly decreased presynaptic EGFP-Actin cluster intensity.. Experimental description: Figure 1: "Piccolo antibody immunoprecipitation from P4 rat brain"

antibody:
Daam1/Mouse monoclonal (Abcam)

selected uniprot accession was the top-hit in BLAST from mouse swissprot record (there is none for rat Daam1)

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
